advancedFeaturesPermissionsTitle.message: Advanced features require additional permissions for:

allHistoryDeletedExceptWhitelisted.message: All history has been deleted except for whitelisted domains

allSelectedUrlDeleted.message: All selected URLs have been deleted

allowAccessToSubmitFeedback.message: Please allow access to submit feedback.

appName.message: Better History | Manage, Export, and Delete History

autoCleanupDisabled.message: Auto-cleanup is disabled. You can still manually clear history when needed.

autoCleanupEnabled.message: Your browsing history will be automatically cleaned based on the selected schedule.

autoCleanupHelp.message: Automatic cleanup helps maintain your privacy by regularly removing browsing history according to your preferences.

basicSearchDescription.message: {{basicSearch}}: Type any keyword to find matching entries (e.g., "Inbox").

betterHistoryDescription.message: {{betterHistory}} is an innovative browser extension developed by BetterLogic Ltd. It empowers users to manage their browsing history with ease, offering advanced features like custom deletion, precise filters, and an intuitive interface. At BetterLogic Ltd, we prioritize user privacy and seamless functionality to enhance your browsing experience.

blacklistFeatureDescription.message: The Domain Blacklist feature in BetterHistory allows you to block specific websites from being recorded in your browsing history. Once a domain is blacklisted, all past and future visits to that site will be automatically removed.

blacklistInstructionText.message: The Domain Blacklist feature in BetterHistory allows you to block specific websites from being recorded in your browsing history. Once a domain is blacklisted, all past and future visits to that site will be automatically removed.

blacklist_confirmation.message:
Are you sure you want to blacklist {{DOMAIN}} from your browsing history?
Future visits to this domain will no longer be recorded, and all existing history entries for {{DOMAIN}} will be deleted.

blockExactDomain.message: Blocks only the exact domain, not subdomains or specific paths.

blockMainDomainAndSubdomains.message: Blocks the main domain and all its subdomains (mail.example.com, blog.example.com, etc.).

blockSpecificPage.message: Blocks only a specific page on the domain.

blockSpecificPath.message: Blocks all pages under a specific path on the domain.

blockSpecificSubdomain.message: Blocks only a specific subdomain, not the main domain or other subdomains.

bulkAddBlacklistDomains.message: Add multiple domains to your blacklist at once. Enter one domain per line.

caseSensitivityDescription.message: Case Sensitivity: Searches are case-insensitive by default.

clearHistoryConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete your entire browsing history? This action is permanent and cannot be undone.

clickToRequestPermissions.message: Click the button below to request them.

contactLimitReached.message: You've already reached your contact limit for today.

containsMultipleWordsDescription.message: Contains Multiple Words: Use {{pipe}} to search for entries containing one of several words (e.g., {{example}}).

currentlyYouCanViewDataForPastXDays.message: Currently, you can view data for the past {{days}} {{dayLabel}}. More days will be added automatically.

deleteAllForHour.message:
Are you sure you want to permanently delete all browsing history for {{startHour}}?
This will delete the browsing history for the entire hour ({{startAndendHour}}). Once deleted, this action cannot be undone.

deleteAllFromDate.message:
Are you sure you want to permanently delete all browsing history for {{date}}?
This will remove all records from that day. Once deleted, this action cannot be undone.

deleteAllSearchHistory.message:
Are you sure you want to permanently delete all searched browsing history entries listed on this page?
This action will remove all entries displayed in the current search results. Once deleted, this action cannot be undone.

deleteDomainConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete all history from {{domain}} domain? This action will remove all related entries and cannot be undone.

deleteHistoryConfirmation.message: Are you sure you want to delete your entire browsing history? This action is permanent and cannot be undone.

deleteStatsConfirmation.message:
You're about to permanently delete all tracking data for {{DOMAIN}} from BetterHistory.

This action cannot be undone.

deleteUrlConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete {{url}} URL from your history? This action cannot be undone.

deletedSelectedHistory.message:
Are you sure you want to permanently delete the {{selectedNumber}} selected history entries?
This action will delete all {{selectedNumber}} selected entries permanently. Once deleted, this action cannot be undone.

disableTimeTracking.message: Disabling this will stop tracking and hide all stats.

domainAlreadyExists.message: This domain is already in your list

emailArticleDesc.message: {{emailArticle}}: Browse our support guides and FAQs at BetterHistory Support.

emailSupportDescription.message: {{emailSupport}}: For any questions or issues, reach out to us at 📧 support@betterhistory.io.

enableStatsDescription.message: Enable or disable all statistics functionality. When disabled, no stats will be collected or displayed.

enterDomain.message: Enter the Domain You Want to Exclude from History

enterDomainPerLine.message: Add multiple domains to your whitelist at once. Enter one domain per line.

eraseAllHistoryFromThisSite.message: Delete All History for This Site

errorClearingHistory.message: Failed to clear history. Please try again.

errorLoadingSettings.message: Error loading settings. Using default values.

errorSavingSettings.message: Failed to save settings. Please try again.

exportHistoryDescription.message: This feature allows you to export your entire browsing history (up to 90 days) or select a custom date range for export. Please note that Chrome's History API only supports exporting history—it does not allow importing history back.

exportHistoryLimitation.message: Additionally, Chrome automatically deletes history older than 90 days, so BetterHistory can only export the records that Chrome retains.

exportTimeTrackingDataDescription.message: This is your locally stored time tracking data that you can export for personal use. It reflects the time you've spent on visited pages, helping you analyze your browsing habits.

exportTimeTrackingDataLimitation.message: This data is only saved in your browser and is not synced or stored online. Removing the BetterHistory extension will permanently delete all time tracking data. Export your data regularly if you wish to keep a backup.

feedbackCheckprivacyPolicyText.message: I accept the Privacy Policy and data processing.

feedbackEmailFollowUpMessage.message: Please provide your email for follow-up on your submission.

feedbackFormDescription.message: {{feedbackForm}}: Click here to submit your feedback.

manageTimeTrackingAndUsageStatsDescripti.message: When enabled, BetterHistory tracks how much time you spend on each website, including session durations and active vs. idle time. All data is stored locally in your browser and used solely to provide you with detailed browsing insights and time analytics.

manifest_description.message: leek History Manager: Powerful search, bulk export, delete custom selections, filter by day/hour, and block domains from history.

mediaPlaybackDescription.message: • Media playback detection (continues tracking during videos/music)

noResultsFound.message: No results found. Try adjusting your search terms or filters.

preventFutureHistoryTracking.message: Blacklist This Site from Recording History

rateText.message: Your input helps us improve BetterHistory. Let us know how we did!

retentionPeriodHelp.message: The retention period determines how far back your browsing history is preserved. Older history will be eligible for cleanup.

reviewSettingsBeforeConfirming.message: Please review your settings before confirming.

searchTipsMsg1.message: Regular expression searching is now supported!

searchTipsMsg4.message: Searching will automatically look for visits by page title and URL, and downloads by filename and URL.

searchTipsMsg5.message: Your last 10,000 visits are used for a fast, initial search. To search deeper, visit the bottom of the last page of results and click the 'Search Deeper' button.

searchToolDescription.message: This tool allows you to search your browsing history effectively using simple keywords or advanced Regular Expressions (RegEx). Below are some examples to help you get started:

settingsUpdatedSuccessfully.message: Your Smart Auto Cleanup settings have been updated successfully.

shortRetentionWarning.message: Setting a short retention period of one week means your older browsing history will be cleaned up more frequently. Make sure this aligns with your needs.

smartAutoCleanupDescription.message: Automatically manage your browsing history with Smart Auto Cleanup. Choose how often cleanup should run and how long your recent history should be retained.

smartHistoryCleanupDescription.message: Clears your browsing history except for websites you've added to your whitelist. This feature helps you keep your activity private while preserving important history from trusted or frequently used sites.

socialMediaTip.message: For social media sites, consider blocking specific sections (facebook.com/marketplace/*)
